# Intake Inputs (Issue Validation)

## Trigger Context
- Validation request source:
  - [ ] Agent mention in issue comment
  - [ ] `needs-validation` label

## Issue Metadata
- Issue URL:
- Issue title:
- Issue labels:

## Mandatory Sections from Feature Intake
- Feature Name:
- Business Goal:
- Priority (P0/P1/P2):
- In Scope:
- Out of Scope:
- Constraints:
  - time:
  - compatibility:
  - hardware/resource:
  - tooling:
- Dependencies or Related Features:
  - current features:
  - possible future features:
- Acceptance Expectations:
- Requested Output Depth:

## Validation Decision
- Outcome:
  - [ ] Approved
  - [ ] Needs Revision
  - [ ] Architectural Conflict

## Required Feedback Payload
- Missing/inconsistent items:
- Architecture references used:
- Suggested PO next step:
